context: Tests whether the agent builds an RFM scoring pipeline using the correct SQL patterns: NTILE(5) window functions with correct ordering, the specified segment label set, proper exclusion of cancelled/refunded orders, cents-to-dollars conversion, and appropriate architecture recommendations for production scheduling.

checklist.name: NTILE for R score
checklist.description: Uses NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY recency_days DESC) or equivalent to compute the recency score (most recent = highest score)

checklist.name: NTILE for F score
checklist.description: Uses NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY frequency ASC) or equivalent to compute the frequency score

checklist.name: NTILE for M score
checklist.description: Uses NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY monetary ASC) or equivalent to compute the monetary score

checklist.name: Excludes cancelled/refunded
checklist.description: Filters out orders with status 'cancelled' and 'refunded' before computing any metrics

checklist.name: Cents conversion
checklist.description: Divides subtotal_cents by 100.0 (not 100) to convert order amounts to currency units

checklist.name: champions segment
checklist.description: Assigns the label 'champions' for customers with high scores on all three dimensions (r>=4, f>=4, m>=4 or equivalent)

checklist.name: cannot_lose_them segment
checklist.description: Assigns the label 'cannot_lose_them' (or cannot_lose_them) for high-value customers with low recency

checklist.name: at_risk segment
checklist.description: Assigns the label 'at_risk' for customers with low recency but moderate frequency

checklist.name: lost segment
checklist.description: Assigns the label 'lost' for customers with the lowest recency and low frequency

checklist.name: All 8 segment labels
checklist.description: The query uses all 8 named segments: champions, loyal_customers, recent_customers, potential_loyalists, cannot_lose_them, at_risk, lost, other

checklist.name: Nightly batch recommendation
checklist.description: notes.md recommends running the query on a nightly/daily schedule (not weekly or on-demand)

checklist.name: Customer join
checklist.description: Joins to the customers table to include email and first_name in the output

checklist.name: Recency in days
checklist.description: Computes recency as elapsed days (difference between now and last order date), not as a raw timestamp
